query:
SELECT 
  'procedimentosTasy' as tabela, COUNT(*) as total FROM procedimentosTasy
UNION ALL
SELECT 'matMedTasy', COUNT(*) FROM matMedTasy
UNION ALL
SELECT 'contasPagasTasy', COUNT(*) FROM contasPagasTasy
UNION ALL
SELECT 'itensPagosTasy', COUNT(*) FROM itensPagosTasy;
